items.appname: Azure AD Sync (from AADInternals) | Microsoft Azure Active Directory Connect [Community Contributed]

items.metadata_comment: observed in some BEC but subject to many false positives

CloudSponge is a software-as-a-service product that imports all the major address books. Most websites use our product so that their users don't have to type email addresses into their referral forms when they want to send an invitation - greeting card or coupon to someone they know

ByteIntoCyber lists this as Edison Mail with full mailbox synchronization capability seen in BEC investigation context. EntraHunt labels the same ID differently, so keep the ByteIntoCyber name and note the conflict in the review file.
desktop-based email solution fully synchronized with O365 - abused for data exfiltration
Legitimate Microsoft app noted by ByteIntoCyber in suspicious Microsoft 365 applications during BEC investigations; hunt/context only.
ByteIntoCyber notes this Microsoft Edge-related app ID in the context of synchronizing saved passwords in Microsoft Wallet; hunt/context only.
Legitimate Microsoft Edge app ID listed by ByteIntoCyber under suspicious Microsoft 365 applications during BEC investigations; hunt/context only.
Legitimate Microsoft Edge-related app ID listed by ByteIntoCyber under suspicious Microsoft 365 applications during BEC investigations; hunt/context only.
Legitimate Outlook client; ByteIntoCyber marks as mailbox exfiltration risk if used by an attacker. Keep in risky legitimate for hunting only.

SigParser scans emails - calendars - address books - spreadsheets and more to automatically generate profiles on the people and companies who have interacted with your business

First-party Microsoft Visual Studio app id observed in Storm-2372 / APT29 device code phishing waves (2025). Hunt for unexpected device code authentications using this client_id from non-developer user principals.

First-party Microsoft app abused by Volexity-tracked UTA0352 cluster in 2025 OAuth phishing campaign against Ukraine-related NGOs (Visual Studio Code OAuth flow with insiders.vscode.dev redirect URI). Hunt for unusual sign-ins to this client_id paired with Microsoft Graph .default scope.
